# SHA-256 sums of the libkrun bottles ward consumes. Pinned locally even
# though the bottles are also published at igorjs/libkrun-builds, so that a
# compromise of libkrun-builds cannot inject a different binary into ward
# releases without an audit trail in this repo (this file diff in a PR).
#
# Bumping libkrun:
#   1. Update vendor/libkrun-version.txt
#   2. Trigger the build workflow at igorjs/libkrun-builds with the new version
#   3. Copy the per-target SHA-256 sums from that workflow's release into
#      this file. The release packaging workflow (release.yml) refuses to
#      use any downloaded bottle whose hash isn't listed here.
#
# Format: <hex sha256>  libkrun-<version>-<target>.tar.gz
#
# Released as libkrun-v1.19.1 at
# https://github.com/igorjs/libkrun-builds/releases/tag/libkrun-v1.19.1
# Bumped from 1.18.0 to pick up `krun_set_passt_fd` and
# `krun_set_gvproxy_path` (required by rootless networking; see ADR-018).
# Rebuilt 2026-06-26 with NET=1 BLK=1 in upstream Makefile so the
# rootless networking and block-device FFI symbols actually export.
# Earlier 1.19.1 bottle declared them in the header but omitted at
# link time; verified via `nm -gU libkrun.1.19.1.dylib | grep
# _krun_set_passt_fd` against the new bottle.
b1d8e5e81d7bdc1248101b648cfd4913125fa2f46ea4123da827582a58389ded  libkrun-1.19.1-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz
27122587587ec37a32c8c95d76e634786aef17025f004a6f2b1ca3f1a2b79fe7  libkrun-1.19.1-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
832b68a263682603402a4f3de1d04a2ae091416cd4b8e3af4aefa9ba2b1300fb  libkrun-1.19.1-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz
